initiatives.notes: The objective names a future nonprofit extension for social-cause work, but no scoped initiative, legal review, governance model, operating separation, funding policy, or public story receipt exists yet.

notes: This ledger prevents a future nonprofit/social-cause idea from being counted as a portfolio company or treated as launch-ready without separate receipts.
Clear status requires social-cause scope, nonprofit legal review, governance, operating separation, funding policy, and public-story refs.
This gate does not authorize nonprofit formation; it records readiness evidence only.
next_action: When the social-cause extension becomes active work, add scoped nonprofit, legal, governance, funding, operating-separation, and public-story receipts before marking it ready.
